title: CDEK v2 client + YooMoney client + delivery API
description: CDEK v2 OAuth client (token cached in Redis) + tariff/PVZ/order/tracking methods. YooMoney create_payment + static HMAC verify. Celery Beat tracking task.

methods: get_token() — OAuth2, cache in Redis cdek:token TTL=expires_in-60
verify_webhook_signature(secret, body, signature) -> bool  STATIC METHOD
yoomoney_client.hmac_note: Use hmac.compare_digest (timing-safe), NEVER ==. Method is static — no instance needed for verification.

contracts: CDEK OAuth token — Redis ONLY, never in DB or logs
All HTTP calls via httpx.AsyncClient with timeout=30
Retry via tenacity, not manual for loop
acceptance_criteria: GET /delivery/calculate — returns tariffs, no token in response
GET /delivery/pickup-points — cached in Redis after first call
CDEK token cached, not re-fetched on every call
